commands.repair_reason: A focused repair is possible, but it should be treated as PR repair/replacement because the branch is unmergeable and the change adds a new config surface.; Needs attention: The diff has no dependency or CI supply-chain changes, but it does introduce a concrete privacy-sensitive STT bypass via hardcoded Discord channel IDs.; Review finding: [P2] Preserve DM voice-note preflight — extensions/discord/src/monitor/prefl... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Discord channel-level `sttEnabled` plumbing and changes audio preflight so selected guild voice-message channels can be transcribed without mention gating, with transcripts carried into message content/context.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. Current main has an explicit DM audio preflight path and test, while the PR changes the helper to exclude DMs; the new config key is also visibly absent from the strict zod schema.
commands.review_followup: A focused repair is possible, but it should be treated as PR repair/replacement because the branch is unmergeable and the change adds a new config surface.
